content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：達芙黛爾EP·雨幕深處，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：達芙黛爾EP·雨幕深處
你看到了那張臉，那張溫柔的、寧靜的、美麗的臉。
它很快消融在你的記憶中，但你仍會一直記得那場漫長的夜雨結束後，晨曦柔軟光暈的顏色。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST："Daffodil EP·Beyond the Veil of Rain" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

Morimens OST："Daffodil EP·Beyond the Veil of Rain"
You saw that face—gentle, serene, unbearably beautiful.
It dissolves like mist in memory, yet you'll always remember the soft glow of dawn after that endless night of rain.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio

Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：達芙黛爾EP·雨幕深處
